capabilities.label: Future rich web app
capabilities.current_limitations: Reserved for a future richer browser surface; no app route or framework exists.
capabilities.next_step: Define app contract only after static/public data and backend handoff semantics are firmer.
capabilities.notes: No Node/npm/frontend framework or runtime app is implemented.

capabilities.label: Local web workbench
capabilities.current_limitations: Implemented as local/bootstrap web surface; /web/ is not a public static route.
capabilities.next_step: Keep web consuming gateway/public contracts; do not import engine internals.
capabilities.notes: Server-rendered/local behavior is separate from the static publication artifact.

capabilities.label: Lite HTML surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Seed static no-JS/no-CSS pages only; not a live search app.
capabilities.next_step: Keep generated from public data summaries and old-client degradation policy.
capabilities.notes: Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 seeded this projection.

capabilities.label: Plain text surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Plain text seed files only; not terminal interactivity or live search.
capabilities.next_step: Use as fallback for old clients, screen readers, and simple automation.
capabilities.notes: Generated from public data summaries.

capabilities.label: File-tree surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Seed manifests/checksums only; no executable downloads, mirrors, production signed snapshots, or public /snapshots/ route.
capabilities.next_step: Reference Signed Snapshot Format v0 seed example while keeping downloads and production snapshots future.
capabilities.notes: Includes manifest and SHA256SUMS for static public data/file-surface artifacts.

capabilities.label: Static public data
capabilities.current_limitations: Static JSON summaries only, including backend-unconfigured search config and public index summary; not a stable production API.
capabilities.next_step: Use as input for snapshots, text/files projections, relay design, and future native consumers.
capabilities.notes: Generated Public Data Summaries v0 seeded site/dist/data; P56 adds search_config.json and public_index_summary.json.

capabilities.label: Static resolver demo snapshots
capabilities.current_limitations: Fixture-backed static demos only; not live search or API behavior.
capabilities.next_step: Keep demos traceable to public data and Python-oracle fixture outputs.
capabilities.notes: Static Resolver Demo Snapshots v0 seeded this projection.

capabilities.label: Future live backend API handoff
capabilities.current_limitations: /api/v1 is reserved by contract only and is not live.
capabilities.next_step: Use Live Backend Handoff Contract v0 before any hosted backend work.
capabilities.notes: No production API stability promise exists.

capabilities.label: Local public search API/runtime
capabilities.current_limitations: Local/prototype backend runtime plus P54 hosted wrapper readiness only; no deployed hosted backend, verified hosted URL, live probes, rate-limit middleware, auth/accounts, telemetry runtime, downloads, uploads, local path search, arbitrary URL fetch, malware-safety claim, rights-clearance claim, production ranking guarantee, or production API guarantee exists.
capabilities.next_step: P57 Public Search Safety Evidence v0, while hosted wrapper deployment evidence remains operator-gated.
capabilities.notes: First allowed mode is local_index_only. Public Search Safety / Abuse Guard v0 governs limits, forbidden parameters, error mapping, privacy posture, and operator controls for Local Public Search Runtime v0. Public Search Rehearsal v0 records local safe-query and blocked-request evidence. P53 freezes the production-facing contract for P54 without deploying a hosted backend. P54 adds a deployable wrapper and local rehearsal only; hosted deployment remains unverified.

capabilities.label: Static public search handoff
capabilities.current_limitations: Static handoff and local-runtime instructions only; hosted backend URL is unconfigured/unverified and hosted form submission is disabled until future operator evidence exists.
capabilities.next_step: P57 Public Search Safety Evidence v0; backend URL verification remains operator-gated.
capabilities.notes: P56 adds backend-unconfigured search_config.json and public_index_summary.json. No JavaScript, hosted search claim, live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, local path search, telemetry, or production claim.

capabilities.label: Future signed/offline snapshots
capabilities.current_limitations: Signed Snapshot Format v0 defines a contract and repo seed example, and Signed Snapshot Consumer Contract v0 defines future consumer behavior; no public /snapshots/ route, production signed release, signing keys, executable downloads, relay service, native-client runtime, or snapshot reader runtime exists.
capabilities.next_step: Use the snapshot consumer contract as input to Native Client Contract v0 and later relay prototype planning; future production signing/key-management policy remains separate.
capabilities.notes: Seed example is repo-local under snapshots/examples/static_snapshot_v0 and is validated by scripts/generate_static_snapshot.py --check plus scripts/validate_static_snapshot.py. Consumer behavior is contract-only under control/inventory/publication/snapshot_consumer_contract.json.

capabilities.label: Future local relay surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Relay Surface Design v0 and Relay Prototype Planning v0 are implemented as contract, inventory, validation, checklist, and planning work only; no LAN/protocol bridge, FTP, SMB, WebDAV, Gopher, proxy relay, network listener, local HTTP relay, or relay runtime is implemented.
capabilities.next_step: Keep relay future/deferred. A local static HTTP relay prototype may be implemented only after explicit human approval, threat-model review, operator signoff, and snapshot/public-data consumer policy validation.
capabilities.notes: Future relay must be operator-controlled, local-or-LAN scoped, public/read-only by default, private-data-disabled by default, write/admin-disabled for old clients, and live-probe-disabled unless stronger future policy exists.

capabilities.label: Local CLI surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Local developer/native command surface only; not a packaged native app.
capabilities.next_step: Keep local CLI behavior separate from public publication promises.
capabilities.notes: Current local native-style surface; full native clients remain deferred.

capabilities.label: Future native clients
capabilities.current_limitations: Native Client Contract v0 is implemented as design and inventory only; no Windows/macOS/native app project, native GUI, local cache runtime, private ingestion, telemetry, accounts, cloud sync, installer automation, FFI, relay sidecar, native snapshot reader runtime, or Rust runtime wiring exists.
capabilities.next_step: Native Client Project Readiness Review v0 before any native project scaffolding.
capabilities.notes: CLI is the current local native-like surface; native GUI apps remain future/deferred and must consume governed public data, snapshot, live-backend handoff, or relay contracts rather than engine internals.

capabilities.label: Static public site
capabilities.current_limitations: Static publication artifact only; no backend or deployment success claim.
capabilities.next_step: Keep site/dist as current deploy artifact until a later explicit migration.
capabilities.notes: GitHub Pages workflow uploads site/dist as static artifact after validation.

capabilities.label: Public-alpha wrapper
capabilities.current_limitations: Local wrapper/config guard only; not hosted public-alpha production.
capabilities.next_step: Hosted backend requires separate deployment/config and operator signoff.
capabilities.notes: Defaults keep live probes, downloads, local paths, and user storage disabled.

capabilities.label: Future live backend
capabilities.current_limitations: Contract-only; no hosted backend exists.
capabilities.next_step: Implement only after backend handoff, deployment config, abuse controls, and operator signoff.
capabilities.notes: Must remain disabled in static publication.

capabilities.label: Future live probe gateway
capabilities.current_limitations: Policy-only and disabled; no source adapter or network call exists.
capabilities.next_step: Review gateway contract before any explicit live-source approval.
capabilities.notes: Internet Archive live probing remains future/blocked.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: static public site
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer public_static_site in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of public_static_site.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: generated public data
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer data in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of data.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: lite HTML surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer lite in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of lite.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: text surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer text in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of text.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: files surface
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer files in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of files.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: static resolver demo snapshots
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer demo in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of demo.

capabilities.label: Future live search
capabilities.current_limitations: Future hosted live backend search only; static site has no live search. Local Public Search Runtime v0 exists separately as local_index_only prototype runtime.
capabilities.next_step: Requires hosted rehearsal, rate-limit policy, live backend handoff review, and operator signoff before any hosted use.
capabilities.notes: No live probes are enabled by live search, hosted /api/v1/search is not deployed, and safety policy keeps public search local_index_only with live/external behavior disabled.

capabilities.label: Future Internet Archive live probe
capabilities.current_limitations: Blocked pending explicit human approval and source-policy review.
capabilities.next_step: Do not queue unattended; review Live Probe Gateway Contract first.
capabilities.notes: No Internet Archive live calls are implemented.

capabilities.label: Manual external baseline observations
capabilities.current_limitations: Manual observations remain pending; no external baseline observations are fabricated.
capabilities.next_step: Human-operated Batch 0 execution.
capabilities.notes: Google remains manual-baseline only, not a live probe.

capabilities.label: Legacy alias: native clients
capabilities.current_limitations: Legacy capability ID retained for earlier validators.
capabilities.next_step: Prefer native_client in new compatibility-surface docs.
capabilities.notes: Alias of native_client. Native Client Contract v0 keeps GUI native clients future/deferred and adds no Visual Studio/Xcode projects, installers, FFI, or runtime wiring.

capabilities.label: Future Rust runtime
capabilities.current_limitations: Rust remains parity lane only; Python remains oracle.
capabilities.next_step: Continue isolated parity catch-up before any runtime plan.
capabilities.notes: No Rust production runtime exists.

notes: Capability flags let static clients distinguish implemented static surfaces from future backend behavior.
Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 records multiple projections of the same resolver truth instead of making one modern app serve every client.
Legacy IDs are retained for validators added by earlier publication, handoff, and live-probe milestones.
All live backend and live probe capabilities are disabled by default.
Snapshots, relay, native clients, /app, and live /api/v1 remain future/deferred or contract-only.
Signed Snapshot Format v0 adds a repo-local seed snapshot example and contract, while the public /snapshots/ route remains deferred.
Production signed snapshots, real signing keys, executable downloads, relay services, and native clients remain future work.
Public Search Safety / Abuse Guard v0 constrains Local Public Search Runtime v0 with limits, forbidden parameters, privacy defaults, and operator controls while hosted search remains future.
Public Search Rehearsal v0 validates the local/prototype route stack and static handoff without enabling hosted or live behavior.
Static Site Search Integration v0 adds backend-unconfigured search_config.json and public_index_summary.json without hosted deployment.
